title: Toothaches
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Tooth pain can come from dental decay, infection, trauma, or gum disease.
Dental evaluation is needed to treat the underlying cause of tooth pain.
Urgent symptoms include swelling, fever, trouble swallowing, trouble breathing, or severe worsening pain.
